description: Likely extracts or classifies a compact property of the input rather than reproducing the whole canvas. Removes input color(s) [0, 1, 3, 4, 7, 8]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: compact output. Inferred transformation family: extract/count/select. The rule is uncertain and needs task-specific review.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_b9b7f026(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, F, F)
    x2 = argmin(x1, size)
    x3 = rbind(adjacent, x2)
    x4 = remove(x2, x1)
    x5 = extract(x4, x3)
    x6 = color(x5)
    O = canvas(x6, UNITY)
    return O
